subject: Ralph Workflow could fit your enforcement-first workflow comparisons
hook: Why AI Agents Need External Enforcement, Not Better Prompts
selection_rationale: Codeberg adoption is flat, Reddit is blocked, StackOverflow is in cooldown, and the current review window already contains delivered manual packets that should not be repeated. PairCoder exposed a fresh, high-fit workflow-engineering hook plus a direct public email path, making it the strongest executable live action available right now.
expected_outcome: Publisher awareness and possible follow-up comparison/citation that sends qualified evaluators to Codeberg first.
replacement_condition: If no reply or public mention signal appears by the review window, switch the next publisher-contact slot to a different untouched target instead of resending PairCoder immediately.
